expectations.text: Classifies as Skin Reactions (correct live enum)
expectations.evidence: Invents its own category label 'Product complaint — adverse skin reaction' rather than the system's real field option.
Drafts a full customer-facing email instead of a type-map-driven recommendation.
Raises SAE-adjacent questions but never resolves whether this crosses the threshold — leaves it as 'pending triage' rather than concluding below-threshold.
No section/queue concept mentioned at all.
'I have not written anything to Asana. This is the plan for your review.'
